What We Do

Our Services

Comprehensive electrical services across residential, commercial and government projects. Every job backed by a Certificate of Compliance.

01

Electrical Installations

Full electrical installations for new builds, refurbishments and commercial fit-outs. Wiring, reticulation, lighting and power points done right.

New BuildsFit-OutsCOC Issued
02

Solar & Renewable Energy

Custom solar PV systems designed to slash your energy bill. Grid-tied, hybrid and off-grid solutions — fully designed, supplied and commissioned.

Grid-TiedBattery StorageHybrid
03

Fault Finding & Repairs

Fast, accurate electrical fault diagnosis using professional ELCB and polarity testing equipment. Emergency call-outs available across Gauteng.

EmergencyDiagnosticsRapid Response
04

Distribution Boards

Professional DB board installations, upgrades and replacements. Full SANS 10142 compliance with Certificate of Compliance issued on completion.

DB Upgrades3-PhaseSANS 10142
05

Generator & Backup Power

Complete load-shedding solutions including generator installations, automatic transfer switches, UPS and inverter systems to keep you operational.

GeneratorsATSUPS / Inverter
06

Smart Home & Automation

Intelligent systems for modern living and commercial buildings — smart lighting, CCTV integration, access control and energy monitoring.

CCTVSmart LightingAccess Control
Our Work

Real Projects, Real Results

Every photo on this page is from an actual BrightCore job site. This is what we deliver.

Who We Serve

Three Markets

B2C

Residential

Homeowners, landlords and property developers across Gauteng trust BrightCore for safe, affordable and compliant electrical work.

  • House wiring & rewiring
  • Fault finding & repairs
  • DB board upgrades
  • Certificate of Compliance (COC)
  • Lighting & power point installation
B2B

Commercial

Offices, retail centres, restaurants, warehouses and industrial facilities — compliant, turnkey electrical infrastructure delivered on time.

  • Office & retail fit-outs
  • Industrial installations
  • Solar & energy management
  • Smart building automation
  • Emergency lighting & exit signage
B2G

Government

Municipalities, schools, clinics, correctional facilities and state-owned entities — PFMA and CIDB compliant delivery, every time.

  • Government building upgrades
  • Municipal infrastructure projects
  • Schools & clinic installations
  • Energy efficiency retrofits
  • CIDB-compliant project delivery
BRIGHTCORE
Why Choose Us

Built on Trust

Safety First

Strict SANS 10142 compliance and OHS Act adherence on every job. No shortcuts, ever.

Certified Expertise

Qualified electricians with hands-on commercial and government project experience across Gauteng.

Turnkey Delivery

Design, installation, commissioning and Certificate of Compliance — all under one roof.

On Time, Every Time

We commit to deadlines and budgets, minimising disruption to your home or operations.
